\[ \text{Ownership Percentage} = \frac{\text{Raise}}{\text{Post-Money}} \times 100 \]
\[ \text{Ownership Percentage} = \frac{\$3,700,000}{\$19,700,000} \times 100 \]
\[ \text{Ownership Percentage} = 0.1879 \times 100 \]
\[ \text{Ownership Percentage} = 18.79\% \]

The answer is 18.79.
